name: Contra Consensus with Trade Flow Confirmation
hypothesis: A high concentration of liquidity at the ask BBO, supported by deep-book selling pressure, indicates strong resistance. Requiring confirmation from negative realized trade flow (seller-initiated volume) should filter out 'absorption' events and increase signal precision, predicting a downward price move.
mutation_note: Based on feedback for the parent spec, this mutation adds a trade flow confirmation filter (zscore < -1.0) to the existing book-shape and deep-book imbalance conditions, aiming to improve robustness and filter out absorption events.
